hero.name: Eliezer Castillo
hero.title: FULL-STACK ENGINEER
hero.subtitle: Building scalable systems and transactional platforms for real-world products

about.title: About
about.description: Full-Stack Software Engineer with 6+ years of experience building scalable web applications. Recent experience in fintech platforms, developing transactional systems and payment integrations (Moov) on multi-tenant architectures. Strong background in Java and TypeScript, working with modern frameworks in production environments.

achievements: Implemented a multi-tenant fintech platform using Java, Spring Boot, Angular, PostgreSQL, and AWS, supporting dozens of companies in the U.S.
Developed idempotent transaction processing and integrated Moov for secure payment execution and reconciliation.
Optimized an enterprise Voice AI platform (+1500 pages, Sanity CMS), improving SEO health by ~20%.
Built a pre-auction platform (Next.js, NestJS) integrated with a Copart-like ecosystem for scalable inventory exploration and bidding.
Developed role-based dashboards in a multi-user educational platform.
Maintained a production mobile app (React Native) for tool rental operations in the U.S., ensuring stability and resolving critical issues.
Built digital insurance issuance systems (Angular + Java), enabling large-scale distribution through commercial partnerships.
Developed REST APIs (Spring Boot) for B2B integrations, onboarding high-volume clients and opening new business channels.
Built a real-time quoting and appointment management system (Java, JSF, PL/SQL), reducing friction in commercial processes.
Built digital insurance issuance systems (Angular + Java), enabling large-scale distribution through commercial partnerships.
